model_specification_line: model = smf.wls("full_time_employed ~ treatment + C(birthyr) + C(year) + C(statefip) + age + I(age ** 2) + C(sex) + C(educ) + UNEMP + DRIVERSLICENSES + EVERIFY", data=analysis_df, weights=analysis_df["perwt"]).fit(cov_type="cluster", cov_kwds={"groups": analysis_df["statefip"]})
sample_selection: Keep single-year ACS observations from 2006-2011 and 2013-2016 (drop 2012 and all PRCS / multi-year samples).
Restrict to ethnically Mexican respondents (hispan == 1) who were born in Mexico (bpl == 200).
Restrict to noncitizens (citizen == 3) who are not currently attending school (school == 1).
Restrict to likely childhood arrivals with yrimmig <= 2007 and arrival_age = yrimmig - birthyr between 0 and 15.
Restrict to the birth-cohort window 1975-1994 and interview ages 18-45.
